---
title: Loading and handling data 
format: 
    pdf: default
    ipynb: default
jupyter: python3
---

## Loading data from files (`csv`, `xlsx`, `json`) {#sec-loading-files}

## Loading data from online resources (`requests`)  {#sec-loading-online}

## Dataframes (`pandas`) {#sec-pandas}

dt.strftime("%-m/%-d/%y, %H:%M")
